channel.display-name: AWE A Wealth of Entertainment HD

United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Drama Company
programme.desc: An eclectic mix of comedians explore who multiple genres of comedy. Starring Mithun Chakraborty as the ring master of a crew of highly misfit characters including Ali Asgar, Krushna Abhishek & others.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein
programme.desc: Dev Mehta, a top surgeon who can't remember his own skills & past 8 years of life. now, forced to restart as an intern and have to re-learn medicine and face the family he no longer knows.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The lively and diverse residents of Gokuldham Housing Society live together as one big family. They navigate everyday challenges, celebrate festivals and find joy in each other's company.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: Pushpa Patel, a small entrepreneur and an endearing mother of three faces life's challenges with resilience and courage. Her constant pursuit of living a good life serves as an inspiration to many.

programme.title: Tum Ho Naa-ghar Ki Superstar
programme.desc: The show blends emotional storytelling with competitive gameplay, celebrating the intelligence, resilience and aspirations of women across India.

programme.title: Maharani
programme.desc: Rani Bharti, a simple homemaker whose life flips upside down when her husband, Bihar Chief Minister Bheema Bharti, survives an assassination attempt and makes her his successor.

programme.title: Marjaavan
programme.desc: Young couple Raghu and Zoya enjoy their lives together until a vertically challenged gang leader with harmful intentions turns their world upside down.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In Florida, a road rage dispute turns violent; a misunderstanding between cyclists and bikers in Australia causes a heated clash; in Albania, an angry restaurant owner clings to the hood of a car as he smashes through the windshield.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A distracted police officer in Missouri strikes a bicyclist with his vehicle; a woman is caught red-handed keying another person's car in Louisiana; a motorcyclist crashes into a ditch after being sideswiped by a jeep in Illinois.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A woman is dragged by a car along a highway; a delivery driver fights back when she believes that a man is attempting to steal her motorcycle; a construction truck's raised crane wreaks havoc; police pursue a suspect; a sedan plows into a school bus.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In California, an angry driver upsets residents when she refuses to stop honking her horn at a parked car; a military veteran opens fire at another driver after a collision.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A driver in Seattle follows a woman after an incident on the road, resulting in an emotional confrontation; a sobriety checkpoint in New Mexico takes an unexpected turn; a tanker accident on a highway in China turns explosive.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In Canton, Ohio, a horn honk on the road allegedly leads to a man wreaking havoc on a woman's car; in Jonesboro, Ark., chaos ensues when a suspect manages to break free from his handcuffs and holds a lighter flame to the seat.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: An impatient SUV driver in Oregon attacks a cyclist at a red light and gets serious comeuppance; a congressional candidate threatens an officer's job when she pulls him over for speeding and texting while driving.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A traffic jam spat on a California freeway between a motorcyclist and driver turns destructive; in Minnesota, two bicyclists square off with a driver over a right-of-way dispute; a pickup towing a multi-ton drum in Alabama inadvertently releases its payload into oncoming traffic; wildfire fighters in California race to escape an inferno.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A fistfight at an intersection in Ohio takes an odd turn when a third person jumps in; a snowy-weather police chase lands in an icy creek in Wisconsin; a woman in Vietnam leaving work on her scooter gets pinned under a closing security gate; after a minor collision in Arizona, a driver creates an even bigger mess; a bicyclist in Wisconsin attempts to cross a drawbridge that's in operation.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: New Jersey police pull over a city councilman; a semi barrels through a busy intersection in Washington; a motorist in Utah is challenged by a driver who appears to be brake checking; a family loading their car beside a busy road in Thailand ends up in the crosshairs of an oncoming vehicle; an SUV in Chicago following closely behind another vehicle gets an unpleasant surprise.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Professional photographers become the victims of a broad daylight smash and grab in San Francisco; in San Diego, an enraged dog walker goes ballistic when she confronts a speeding driver in her neighborhood.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A man in Queens, New York, attempts to close a street to traffic with a metal barricade; a traffic stop in Florida turns tense when a woman refuses to sign a speeding ticket; an SUV in Utah gets rear-ended onto train tracks; a tow truck driver in Arizona has a fierce struggle to remove a motorcycle from the highway; Drivers in England fling projectiles at each other's vehicles; Biker bandits in Ec

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A raging back and forth between three vehicles ends with a man being rammed head on by a truck; carjackers relentlessly pursue a terrified driver; an angry motorcyclist confronts a driver and is met with a baseball bat.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: An altercation in an Ohio parking lot spirals out of control; disaster strikes when a bus driver in Atlanta appears to fall asleep at the wheel; an irate driver's wrath is unleashed on two friends in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In Iowa, an officer clings to the hood of a suspect's moving vehicle; on the Fourth of July in Minneapolis, vehicles drive through the city shooting fireworks toward pedestrians, two men in Canada trade blows inside a vehicle.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In Florida, a road rage dispute turns violent; a misunderstanding between cyclists and bikers in Australia causes a heated clash; in Albania, an angry restaurant owner clings to the hood of a car as he smashes through the windshield.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A distracted police officer in Missouri strikes a bicyclist with his vehicle; a woman is caught red-handed keying another person's car in Louisiana; a motorcyclist crashes into a ditch after being sideswiped by a jeep in Illinois.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A woman is dragged by a car along a highway; a delivery driver fights back when she believes that a man is attempting to steal her motorcycle; a construction truck's raised crane wreaks havoc; police pursue a suspect; a sedan plows into a school bus.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In California, an angry driver upsets residents when she refuses to stop honking her horn at a parked car; a military veteran opens fire at another driver after a collision.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A driver in Seattle follows a woman after an incident on the road, resulting in an emotional confrontation; a sobriety checkpoint in New Mexico takes an unexpected turn; a tanker accident on a highway in China turns explosive.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In Canton, Ohio, a horn honk on the road allegedly leads to a man wreaking havoc on a woman's car; in Jonesboro, Ark., chaos ensues when a suspect manages to break free from his handcuffs and holds a lighter flame to the seat.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: An impatient SUV driver in Oregon attacks a cyclist at a red light and gets serious comeuppance; a congressional candidate threatens an officer's job when she pulls him over for speeding and texting while driving.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A traffic jam spat on a California freeway between a motorcyclist and driver turns destructive; in Minnesota, two bicyclists square off with a driver over a right-of-way dispute; a pickup towing a multi-ton drum in Alabama inadvertently releases its payload into oncoming traffic; wildfire fighters in California race to escape an inferno.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A fistfight at an intersection in Ohio takes an odd turn when a third person jumps in; a snowy-weather police chase lands in an icy creek in Wisconsin; a woman in Vietnam leaving work on her scooter gets pinned under a closing security gate; after a minor collision in Arizona, a driver creates an even bigger mess; a bicyclist in Wisconsin attempts to cross a drawbridge that's in operation.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: New Jersey police pull over a city councilman; a semi barrels through a busy intersection in Washington; a motorist in Utah is challenged by a driver who appears to be brake checking; a family loading their car beside a busy road in Thailand ends up in the crosshairs of an oncoming vehicle; an SUV in Chicago following closely behind another vehicle gets an unpleasant surprise.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Professional photographers become the victims of a broad daylight smash and grab in San Francisco; in San Diego, an enraged dog walker goes ballistic when she confronts a speeding driver in her neighborhood.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A man in Queens, New York, attempts to close a street to traffic with a metal barricade; a traffic stop in Florida turns tense when a woman refuses to sign a speeding ticket; an SUV in Utah gets rear-ended onto train tracks; a tow truck driver in Arizona has a fierce struggle to remove a motorcycle from the highway; Drivers in England fling projectiles at each other's vehicles; Biker bandits in Ec

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A raging back and forth between three vehicles ends with a man being rammed head on by a truck; carjackers relentlessly pursue a terrified driver; an angry motorcyclist confronts a driver and is met with a baseball bat.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: An altercation in an Ohio parking lot spirals out of control; disaster strikes when a bus driver in Atlanta appears to fall asleep at the wheel; an irate driver's wrath is unleashed on two friends in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In Iowa, an officer clings to the hood of a suspect's moving vehicle; on the Fourth of July in Minneapolis, vehicles drive through the city shooting fireworks toward pedestrians, two men in Canada trade blows inside a vehicle.

programme.title: GMA3
programme.desc: Fifty States in 50 Weeks: America the Beautiful series stops in Alaska; 50 States in 50 Weeks: America the Beautiful series stops in Hawaii; Deals & Steals with Tory Johnson.

programme.title: General Hospital
programme.desc: Carly is on the warpath; Britt is in the hot seat; Dante breaks bad news; Molly wants answers; Charlotte seeks Lulu's help.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A marriage ends, but the drama lives on under one roof; the plaintiff says her ex refuses to move out and owes mortgage payments; he says she's just jealous of his new relationship.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: Two plaintiffs were hired separately to care for the defendant's daughter but never got paid; the mother says the sitters are inflating the amount owed and accuses one of them of hitting her daughter.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean
programme.desc: A specialty chef sues for breach of contract; friends feud over a chair that was being stored.

programme.title: Inside Edition
programme.desc: A syndicated news magazine includes investigative reports, interviews with newsmakers, human interest stories and celebrity and pop-culture features.

programme.title: 7 News at 5pm
programme.desc: Stay informed with the latest breaking news and headlines.

programme.title: 7 News at 6pm
programme.desc: Stay informed with the latest breaking news and headlines.

programme.title: ABC World News Tonight With David Muir
programme.desc: Delivering the news that matters most.

programme.title: 7 News at 7pm
programme.desc: Stay informed with the latest breaking news and headlines.

programme.title: Access Hollywood
programme.desc: Individual on-set interviews with John Stamos, Demi Lovato, Valerie Bertinelli and more.

programme.title: Disney Celebrates America: The Pursuit of Happiness
programme.desc: A coast-to-coast event exploring Disney Parks and attractions as a portal through which America's greatest stories, triumphs and traditions are celebrated.

programme.title: GMA3
programme.desc: Fifty States in 50 Weeks: America the Beautiful series stops in Alaska; 50 States in 50 Weeks: America the Beautiful series stops in Hawaii; Deals & Steals with Tory Johnson.

programme.title: The Jennifer Hudson Show
programme.desc: Actress Tamera Mowry-Housley ("Baked With Love: Holiday"); singer-songwriter Raye chats and performs.

programme.title: General Hospital
programme.desc: Carly is on the warpath; Britt is in the hot seat; Dante breaks bad news; Molly wants answers; Charlotte seeks Lulu's help.

programme.title: NewsCenter 5 at 4:00
programme.desc: Local and regional news coverage.

programme.title: NewsCenter 5 at 4:30
programme.desc: Local and regional news.

programme.title: NewsCenter 5 at 5:00
programme.desc: Latest local and regional news.

programme.title: NewsCenter 5 at 6:00
programme.desc: Stay informed with the latest breaking news and headlines.

programme.title: ABC World News Tonight With David Muir
programme.desc: Delivering the news that matters most.

programme.title: NewsCenter 5 at 7:00
programme.desc: Local and regional news coverage.

programme.title: Chronicle
programme.desc: Some classic Patriotic episodes, from the longest running Fourth of July parade in the country, to the town with most patriotic zip code in the country (01776), the question of is Concord the birthplace of American liberty, or is it nearby Lexington?

programme.title: Disney Celebrates America: The Pursuit of Happiness
programme.desc: A coast-to-coast event exploring Disney Parks and attractions as a portal through which America's greatest stories, triumphs and traditions are celebrated.

programme.title: GMA3
programme.desc: Fifty States in 50 Weeks: America the Beautiful series stops in Alaska; 50 States in 50 Weeks: America the Beautiful series stops in Hawaii; Deals & Steals with Tory Johnson.

programme.title: Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Chef Mason Hereford shares the story behind his cult-favorite fried-bologna sandwich; chef Ashleigh Shanti cooks fried catfish with homemade tartar sauce and "quickles"; musician Troy Andrews, aka Trombone Shorty, brings New Orleans flavor to a one-sheet-pan shrimp boil; chef Luis Pous shows how to make festive summer mocktails; summer entertaining giveaways for the Tam Fam.

programme.title: General Hospital
programme.desc: Carly is on the warpath; Britt is in the hot seat; Dante breaks bad news; Molly wants answers; Charlotte seeks Lulu's help.

programme.title: Eyewitness News First at 4
programme.desc: Local and regional news coverage.

programme.title: Eyewitness News at 5
programme.desc: Local and regional news.

programme.title: Eyewitness News at 6
programme.desc: Stay informed with the latest breaking news and headlines.

programme.title: ABC World News Tonight With David Muir
programme.desc: Delivering the news that matters most.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Disney Celebrates America: The Pursuit of Happiness
programme.desc: A coast-to-coast event exploring Disney Parks and attractions as a portal through which America's greatest stories, triumphs and traditions are celebrated.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth helps Robert and Thomas look for a holiday home near La Mata in south east Spain - a stepping stone to making a permanent move there. Can they find their dream pad for £82k.

programme.title: Dover 24/7: Britain's Busiest Port
programme.desc: Police chase a man spotted jumping from a lorry. Border Force bust a cigarette-smuggling scam. And can port crews dock an unwieldy Spanish galleon.

programme.title: George Clarke's Remarkable Renovations
programme.desc: In Cornwall, George meets Abi and Morveth, who've sunk their life savings into a disused electrical substation. Can they turn this neglected shell into their home.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Decorator Philip has fallen 12 feet from a ladder. Liam flew off the back of a motorbike at high speed. And three-year-old Jonah has injured his elbow while playing with his mum.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A man has been run over by a lorry at work. Elizabeth has a head wound from falling while cleaning a pub. And retired coal miner Alan reminisces about going down the pit aged 15.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces, some of Britain's favourite personalities, hit the sofa for the week's big shows, sharing their sharp, insightful and funny points of view.

programme.title: rage New Music
programme.desc: Your weekend begins with an all-night music video marathon. rage brings you New Releases showcasing the latest in buzzed-about and boundary-pushing music videos.

programme.title: rage Charts
programme.desc: Keep the party vibe going every Saturday morning with wall-to-wall music videos, from classic hits and long-forgotten tracks from the rage vault, to the latest new releases and special features.

programme.title: rage Charts
programme.desc: Keep the party vibe going every Saturday morning with wall-to-wall music videos, from classic hits and long-forgotten tracks from the rage vault, to the latest new releases and special features.

programme.title: Weekend Breakfast
programme.desc: All the news you need to start your weekend. Fauziah Ibrahim and Johanna Nicholson bring you the latest news, interviews, politics, culture, weather and global affairs. Plus sport with Jared Coote.

programme.title: rage Charts
programme.desc: Keep the party vibe going every Saturday morning with wall-to-wall music videos, from classic hits and long-forgotten tracks from the rage vault, to the latest new releases and special features.

programme.title: If You're Listening
programme.desc: Water is the lifeblood of all civilisations. In Iran, the water is drying up. The result is a slow-moving environmental emergency now pressing into politics, daily life, and the stability of the regime itself.

programme.title: ABC News Update
programme.desc: The headlines from ABC News, updating you on the day's top stories from across Australia and around the world.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: All questions revolve around alligators, astronomy, Asia and aisles. The panellists are Alan Davies, Rich Hall, Jeremy Hardy and Bill Bailey.

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: Emily reluctantly agrees to help her secret admirer, revealed to be a person from her past. In return they extend Emily an enticing offer. Nick pairs up the A-troupe dancers in order to prepare for a major performance.

programme.title: Popularity Papers
programme.desc: Inspired by Greta Thunberg's worldwide popularity, Lydia embarks on becoming an eco-activist too, but her focus on personal fame threatens to undo the hard work accomplished by their school Eco Club president Dimitri.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: The Bears participate in a brother-themed game show.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: The Bears help a teenager become a famous singer.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: A storm rolls in while the Bears are separated. Grizz looks after the Poppy Rangers; Panda is stuck with Charlie in his car, and Chloe and Ice Bear are in the city seeking a ride home.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Nom Nom is ordered by his doctor to take a vacation.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: The Bears allow bees to live in the cave to make honey.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: Squatter Otter tries to win Panda's trust and convince the Bears to live in a mysterious house.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Bitzer rounds up the Flock for bedtime. Alas, a noisy intruder scuppers their plans. The Flock must find an inventive way to get rid of the pest if they are ever going to get a good night's rest.

programme.title: The Coop Troop
programme.desc: After reading the 'Tortoise and the Hare', Reggie challenges Maggie to a race. Thinking she'll win, Maggie jumps at the chance, but can she overcome all the distractions which keep slowing her down?

programme.title: Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja's search to defeat Shatterspin leads them to new masters while Cole returns home to find the Finders under attack.

programme.title: Mechamato
programme.desc: After discovering a pair of robot doors with the ability to open a two-way portal, Amato and his friends go on wild adventures during recess, only to find themselves stranded on a remote island.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin discover Principal Brown's diploma is a fake. When Gumball and Darwin discover his diploma is fake, Principal Brown is determined to keep their discovery a secret.

programme.title: My Little Pony: Friendship Is Magic
programme.desc: Twilight is torn when she discovers the cruise she and her family are on, is a themed vacation experience in which ponies have paid for the privilege of spending time with her.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Finn goes on an embarrassing quest to get armour to fit in with some really cool knights.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: When Jake becomes sick, the only thing that can cure him is a good story, so he asks Finn to go out and find one.

programme.title: Be Cool, Scooby-Doo!
programme.desc: Daphne brings the gang to a fancy Ice Hotel co-owned by her family where a new exhibit of ice age artifacts is opening. Things heat up, however, when a frozen Ice Man thaws out and goes on a rampage inside the hotel.

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark
programme.desc: Optimus lands a prestigious photoshoot, so Robby and Hashtag take his battle worn trailer to get detailed. Unfortunately, the Decepticons steal it from them! The kids race the clock to get it back in one piece.

programme.title: Steven Universe
programme.desc: Steven, Garnet and Amethyst chase after a monster that is loose in the temple. Meanwhile, Amethyst keeps trying to find a new form into which to regenerate.

programme.title: GG: Spawn Squad
programme.desc: We're off to Bikini Bottom! In this first look Harry, Mason and Harry take turns playing SpongeBob SquarePants: Titans Of The Tide in search of buried treasure!

programme.title: Unikitty
programme.desc: The Land Lord has threatened Master Frown and Brock with eviction unless they fix the damage they've done to their apartment. Worried, Brock invites Unikitty and the gang to help.

programme.title: Unikitty
programme.desc: During the gang's Halloween party, Unikitty discovers Rick isn't scared of anything! To get him in the holiday spirit, they each tell their own ideas of what a spooky story is. Hoping to scare the emotionless Rick for once.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin forms a book club to debut his new autobiography, but the Titans would rather discuss other books.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The Tower is in lockdown and supplies are being gathered, as the Titans prepare for Doomsday.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Sign of the Broken Sword: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric in the 1950s Cotswolds. Brown investigates a murder at the local army barracks and another at Dunkirk.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: A college dropout is murdered and the subsequent investigation leads Carrie and Al to an off-the-grid community on an abandoned island near Manhattan.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Jack faces a life-changing decision while investigating the murder of a man found dead in a boat off the Saint Marie coast.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective at work on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. The team enter the world of island politics when the outgoing governor of Saint Marie is poisoned.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown races to save Bunty from the hangman's noose when she is tried for murder.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Sign of the Broken Sword: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric in the 1950s Cotswolds. Brown investigates a murder at the local army barracks and another at Dunkirk.

programme.title: Vicarious Escapes
programme.desc: Situated within the southern Botswana bush, Dinaka is an exclusive private retreat within the large semi-arid sandy savanna of the Kalahari Desert; home to some of the most incredible wildlife and with guaranteed total seclusion.

programme.title: WOW!
programme.desc: Cape Cod, Martha's Vineyard, and Nantucket.

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: Skiing in the Andes; a wine farm.

programme.title: Find Me a Vacation Home
programme.desc: From beachside bungalows to mountain lodges, property hunters look for luxurious vacation homes where paradise is in the backyard.

programme.title: Selling Jets
programme.desc: Whether for business or pleasure, the world of private jets is exciting and enticing; sellers are giving an inside look on deals involving state of the art aircraft.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: Mauritius is a melting pot of cultures; experience water skiing or a peaceful excursion through the botanical gardens; Jamaica is the third largest island in the Caribbean and prime for scuba diving.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: A meeting with a woman who secretly transcribed 3,000 Hollywood films while under an oppressive regime inspires Jonathan to make his own movie; So with a small budget and a cast of local actors he scouts Saxon castles, Danube tributaries, and ruined buildings to direct an action adventure flick.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Bubba is a corporate lawyer from Georgia planning to move to Charleston, SC with his wife, Grace, to start his own practice; he wants a home with charm and quaintness while Grace is thinking bigger and looking forward to starting a family.

programme.title: Tasting America
programme.desc: One person samples food they wouldn't normally try, to see how they react to dishes they wouldn't normally eat.

programme.title: Selling Yachts
programme.desc: Steve asks Will Snyder if chartering might change the equation; Mark and Chloe, a young couple with a limited budget, are looking for a coastal cruiser to entertain family and friends.

programme.title: Boys Toys
programme.desc: Testing fast and expensive cars, like the Porsche GT3 RS and BMW M4 GTS, at the Willow Springs Race Way.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.desc: Jonathan heads to Malaysia to learn about sea turtles, explore mangroves and investigate wolffish.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: The nightlife and beach culture of Phuket, Thailand.

programme.title: Behind the Gates
programme.desc: A $48 million penthouse in Miami; unique penthouses in Los Angeles and New York.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Puzzle over a tricky snuff box, two stage dummies and a metal cinema ticket.

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: It's Ian's first day as director of integrity, and his first challenge is to decide which cities should host the semi-finals; it's also Miami Day, which may or may not be a Thing.

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: A new environmental report on global heating causes temperatures to rise in the Oversight Team as they try to find ways to combat not only the report but global heating itself.

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: With the announcement of the new tournament ambassador imminent, the Oversight Team finalizes their logistics for the unveiling, but it seems Zurich may have plans of their own.

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: Sarah's wooden condoms gaffe has gone viral at the same time as rumors about a high-profile footballer demand an immediate response; can the team rise to both challenges?

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: The official unveiling of the new tournament football hits trouble when an online conspiracist makes incendiary claims about the dangers of the ball's advanced new technology.

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: A boycott and politics threaten the opening ceremony after a visit from its creative director; it's time for Ian to think about life after football.

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: It's Ian's first day as director of integrity, and his first challenge is to decide which cities should host the semi-finals; it's also Miami Day, which may or may not be a Thing.

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: A new environmental report on global heating causes temperatures to rise in the Oversight Team as they try to find ways to combat not only the report but global heating itself.

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: With the announcement of the new tournament ambassador imminent, the Oversight Team finalizes their logistics for the unveiling, but it seems Zurich may have plans of their own.

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: Sarah's wooden condoms gaffe has gone viral at the same time as rumors about a high-profile footballer demand an immediate response; can the team rise to both challenges?

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: The official unveiling of the new tournament football hits trouble when an online conspiracist makes incendiary claims about the dangers of the ball's advanced new technology.

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: A boycott and politics threaten the opening ceremony after a visit from its creative director; it's time for Ian to think about life after football.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: A thrilling battle of brainpower as four contestants pit their wits against The Chaser.

programme.title: Look East
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather for the East of England.

programme.title: MOTD Live: Australia v Egypt
programme.desc: The 2026 FIFA World Cup round of 32 continues with Australia against Egypt in Dallas, with only two places separating the sides in the world rankings at the start of the tournament.

programme.title: How Are You? It's Alan (Partridge)
programme.desc: Alone in the Peaks with only a selfie stick, Alan asks: can nature heal a troubled mind? Contains some strong language.

programme.title: BBC News and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news, with reports from BBC correspondents worldwide.

programme.title: Look East
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather for the East of England.

programme.title: Marry Me
programme.desc: A singer marries a stranger picked in the crowd at one of her concerts.

programme.title: Wimbledon 2026
programme.desc: Live coverage of the Championships at the All England Lawn Tennis Club at Wimbledon.

programme.title: Wimbledon 2026
programme.desc: Live coverage of the Championships at the All England Lawn Tennis Club at Wimbledon.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Join Sandi Toksvig, Alan Davies, Cally Beaton, Jamali Maddix and Josh Widdicombe for a look at animals which begin with the letter S.

programme.title: Newsnight, followed by Weather
programme.desc: Insights and global interviews on the crucial news stories of the day. With Katie Razzall. Followed by Weather.

programme.title: Today at Wimbledon
programme.desc: A look back at the day's play at Wimbledon.

programme.title: Storage Wars Canada
programme.desc: Roy brings along Bogart's sisters to try and throw him off at the auction. Meanwhile, Ursula is in a bad mood and the others try to take advantage.

programme.title: Storage Wars Canada
programme.desc: The Roy Dirnbeck Story: After months of waiting for Cindy to set a wedding date, Rick makes a bold move at an auction. Roy records his memoirs for posterity.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: The auction action moves to Dallas. After Kenny Stowe flashes his fat wallet, Bubba takes him on in a bidding battle to remember.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: Excuse Me, I Think You're Stupid: Big egos clash on the fierce bidding battleground of Fort Worth. Cowboy Matt and Kenny go to war over an abandoned unit of furniture.

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: Join antiques expert and presenter David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal or take a chance at auction instead.

programme.title: Chaos Uncut
programme.desc: Bad criminals, death-defying rescues and chaos in the skies all feature as the mayhem continues in Chaos Uncut.

programme.title: Chaos Uncut
programme.desc: Bad criminals, death-defying rescues and chaos in the skies all feature as the mayhem continues in Chaos Uncut.

programme.title: Weird Britain
programme.desc: Andy McGrath teams up with paranormal historian Dr Kate Cherrell and folklorist Ceri Houlbrook to uncover Hertfordshire's eerie legends and dark tales.

programme.title: The Unxplained With William Shatner
programme.desc: Bible relics are investigated to verify if they provide physical evidence for biblical events and miracles.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Brought to you by The Shopping Channel

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Brought to you by The Shopping Channel

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: NY
programme.desc: Luis is still trying to figure out what's been confusing him for the last few months. S5 Ep12

programme.title: Horrible Science
programme.desc: Manky Materials and Shifty States Special. Einstein reacts to an elephant's toothpaste volcano.

programme.title: The Next Step: Cheer
programme.desc: The Comets run their full-out for the first time, but it doesn't go as expected.

programme.title: The Dumping Ground
programme.desc: Series 14 Preview. Dani Harmer promotes the new series of The Dumping Ground... and it's chaos.

programme.title: Ricky Sprocket: Showbiz Boy
programme.desc: When Ricky takes the summer off from the movie biz he has nothing to do.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Tom's living room fills with lava, and he goes to live with Angela; Tom hopes to get closer to her.

programme.title: Wishfart
programme.desc: Akiko wishes Tsuni would sing at karaoke night; the café is turned into a robo-automat.

programme.title: Rollbots
programme.desc: Botch launches an attack to steal another artifact before Vertex can claim it.

programme.title: For Better or for Worse
programme.desc: The life and times of the Patterson family.

programme.title: Chaotic
programme.desc: A series of snaps leads to boys vs. girls match; Sarah tells Tom the story of OverWorld warrior Intress.

programme.title: Sindbad and the 7 Galaxies
programme.desc: Sinbad's bot is missing which kick-starts a race against time to solve a mysterious set of clues and foil Dr. Shiny's attempt to pull off his biggest heist ever.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse takes on an army of vengeful soft toys which stops playtime in its tracks.

programme.title: Dex Hamilton: Alien Entomologist
programme.desc: Enormous seeds hit Earth.

programme.title: Future Card Buddyfight X
programme.desc: Guru Bunbuku calls Kiri Hyoryu to assist him, but then... The Grim Reaper makes his appearance, and challenges Gaito to a Buddyfight.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy helps Caleb with his son's pony; Lou and Jessica start a new venture, while Katie tries a risky new hobby; Logan takes a big step in his relationship with Miley, but then disaster strikes.

programme.title: CBC Newsroom
programme.desc: News program bringing Canadians breaking news and live coverage from across Canada and around the world.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Briony May Williams and a buyer from London tour properties in rural Somerset and Dorset.

programme.title: Family Feud Canada
programme.desc: The Yu family returns to face the Annor family.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: The Critch men are left to their own devices after Mary is hospitalized for a minor procedure; Mark has trouble balancing the household chores and accidentally gives Pops the wrong pills.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch and Ogden are named as accomplices when Terrence Meyers faces charges of treason.

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: With Christmas around the corner, Julienne and Winifred must visit the Mother House. Meanwhile, Trixie is back in town, and the midwives are faced with a challenge.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Together
programme.desc: A stuffed slow-roasted lamb shoulder with all the trimmings; rainbow tomato crostini; strawberry panna cotta.

programme.desc: Coverage of the top local news.

programme.desc: Sam's mental state declines as he faces a troubling situation; a suspicious Maria is stood up by Gary; Debbie's pals organize a surprise vacation; Carla makes a discovery.

programme.title: Live: CBC Toronto News
programme.desc: Dwight Drummond and team take a comprehensive look at the top stories, with breaking news, reports and updates relevant to the city of Toronto.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sam's mental state declines as he faces a troubling situation; a suspicious Maria is stood up by Gary; Debbie's pals organize a surprise vacation; Carla makes a discovery.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Everyone is keen to win the sandcastle competition and enjoy a special ice cream prize, but teamwork is the key.

programme.title: Hello Kitty: Super Style!
programme.desc: P.I. revives an ancient sport competition, the Penguinese Games; athlete Kitty helps Zing realize having fun is sometimes more important than winning.

programme.title: Molly of Denali
programme.desc: Molly spends the night at Tooey's house when a blizzard strikes Qyah.

programme.title: Jeremy and Jazzy
programme.desc: Jeremy, Jazzy, Stu and Tunebug sing the cleanup song when they have a mess that needs to be put away.

programme.title: Addison
programme.desc: Kevin believes his radio-controlled model car is haunted.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy helps Caleb with his son's pony; Lou and Jessica start a new venture, while Katie tries a risky new hobby; Logan takes a big step in his relationship with Miley, but then disaster strikes.

programme.title: BC Today
programme.desc: The show where British Columbians connect on issues facing their lives and their community.

programme.title: Call the Midwife

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Together
programme.desc: A stuffed slow-roasted lamb shoulder with all the trimmings; rainbow tomato crostini; strawberry panna cotta.

programme.title: Live: CBC Nova Scotia News
programme.desc: Tom Murphy and Amy Smith bring Nova Scotians news and weather every weeknight.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sam's mental state declines as he faces a troubling situation; a suspicious Maria is stood up by Gary; Debbie's pals organize a surprise vacation; Carla makes a discovery.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags
programme.desc: There's no sound, but there are laughs; Quebec-based troupe uses the city as its stage and its inhabitants, or victims, as characters.

programme.title: Marketplace
programme.desc: Marketplace investigates 200 of TikTok's most popular health videos and uncovers a troubling trend: misinformation is not only widespread, it's thriving; how influencers are racking up views by pushing misleading or outright false health claims.

programme.title: The Young and the Restless
programme.desc: Jack plays a dangerous game with Patty; Kyle's plan to rescue Diane takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programme.desc: Deke tells Remy he's not ready to give him another chance; Will faces the consequences of hiding the truth from Electra; Brooke's anguish over Hope's betrayal leads to a dramatic breaking point.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Naomi and Jacob spend their anniversary apart, both remembering their love story from first date to wedding vows; Izaiah helps his brother out; Naomi leans on Ashley, Dani and Bill.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A woman and her three grandchildren are accused of leaving a huge mess on their way out of a rental home; a woman says her former friend stole the boat they bought together.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A caregiver says she was the victim of vandalism and harassment soon after she questioned her client's need for state-sponsored support.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A marriage ends, but the drama lives on under one roof; the plaintiff says her ex refuses to move out and owes mortgage payments; he says she's just jealous of his new relationship.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: Two plaintiffs were hired separately to care for the defendant's daughter but never got paid; the mother says the sitters are inflating the amount owed and accuses one of them of hitting her daughter.

programme.title: CBS News New York 5pm
programme.desc: Evening news coverage.

programme.title: CBS News New York 6pm
programme.desc: Stay informed with the latest breaking news and headlines.

programme.title: CBS Evening News
programme.desc: Tony Dokoupil shares the day's most important stories, delivering context and depth to bring greater understanding to one's world.

programme.title: Tri State 250: Our Legacy of Liberty
Sheriff Country
programme.desc: Sheriff Mickey Fox aids a federal investigation into a high-stakes case involving alleged interstate crime and a web of local land deals.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police recovered a submerged car but the driver was missing. Evidence found inside the car would lead them down a trail of obsession.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a man reported that his girlfriend had shot and killed herself, a post mortem ruled against suicide. But who killed her and why.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A woman recounts a terrifying story detailing the narrow escape of her small dog from the jaws of a Pit Bull on the loose.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: After allegedly being rear-ended by a truck, a woman claims the truck's driver jumped out and begged her not to call the cops, then sued her for $5,000.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A woman, being sued for causing a collision, points the finger at her fellow motorist whom she claims made a left turn in front of her.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A man claims he suffered a scratched cornea after his ex-friend allegedly attacked him, put him in a headlock and demanded his truck back.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A heated dispute over funeral expenses leads to an incident of alleged domestic violence between ex-lovers.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A landlord uses a hidden video camera to try and catch a former tenant in the act of stealing her personal information.

programme.title: Murder UK
programme.desc: In the quiet town of Hyde, Greater Manchester, patients of respected GP Harold Shipman begin dying in unusually high numbers.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: The Leanne Tiernan Murder
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to Yorkshire to investigate the abduction and murder of Leanne Tiernan.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Secret Life and Public Death
programme.desc: Jackie Malton examines the 1988 murder of Danny Denbury in Newport, killed in his home by ex-soldier Christopher McGovern following a night out.

programme.title: Murder By The Sea
programme.desc: Brian Bishop was shot and killed in a shoot-out with an armed robber as they returned to a stash point piled high with stolen cash.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When Gagandip Singh's body was discovered in a burnt-out car, detectives found out that his father was murdered on a business trip - was there a connection between both deaths.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's payment day following a wonderful week in Wales. The problem is, none of the B&Bers can agree on what exactly was wonderful about it.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Bristol, can George's restaurant-standard food and 'cheeky' menu floor his guests and bag him the grand.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: Our Farm Next Door: Amanda Clive and Kids
programme.desc: Amanda and the girls go on an unforgettable camping trip. And Amanda searches for a traditional Yorkshire fireplace for the living room.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces, some of Britain's favourite personalities, hit the sofa for the week's big shows, sharing their sharp, insightful and funny points of view.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host the anarchic game show. Rob Beckett and Joe Wilkinson take on Sarah Millican and Jamali Maddix. With Glenn Moore.

programme.title: TFI Friday Unplugged
programme.desc: Chris Evans presents his iconic show. Enjoy unfiltered conversations with the biggest stars and bands performing intimate sets.

programme.title: Kent: The Garden of England
programme.desc: once home to Anne Boleyn - with its incredible gardens; climb to Kent's highest village, Ide Hill; and visit Kent's oldest 'modern' vineyard near Biddenden.

programme.title: Alexander Armstrong Across America
programme.desc: Alexander explores one of the world's most powerful, complex countries, starting in Philadelphia, where he sees contrasts - from the Declaration of Independence to the opioid crisis.

programme.title: Stonehenge: The Discovery with Dan Snow
programme.desc: ...Dan Snow. The presenter pieces together the story of the magnificent Stone Age circle.

programme.title: D-Day: The Unseen Footage
programme.desc: Featuring never-before-seen footage, this important film follows Allied soldiers from the beaches on D-Day through a three-month inland march to liberate French cities from Nazi occupation.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: While investigating the burglary of allegedly empty premises by a machete-wielding masked gang, cops discover the house is hiding a colossal three-storey cannabis farm.

programme.title: Piers Morgan: Uncensored
programme.desc: The bold, opinion-led news and debate show hosted by Piers Morgan. Piers blends journalism, debates and cultural commentary that's unapologetically direct.

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Warwick Davis hosts the game show where 10 is the magic number as contestants put their general knowledge to the test for a £125,000 jackpot prize.

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts the game show that asks celebrities to complete a series of general knowledge questions faster than The Chaser.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts the game show that asks contestants to complete a series of general knowledge questions faster than The Chaser, a brainbox of the highest order.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts the game show that asks contestants to complete a series of general knowledge questions faster than The Chaser.

programme.title: The Celebrity Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts the game show that asks celebrities to complete a series of general knowledge questions faster than The Chaser.

programme.title: Bullseye
programme.desc: Dartboard quiz game that tests contestants' darts skills and their general knowledge.

programme.title: Bullseye
programme.desc: Dartboard quiz game that tests contestants' darts skills and their general knowledge.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve escapes police custody after being wrongly nabbed for murder; guest Gary Lockwood.

programme.title: The Rockford Files
programme.desc: In Las Vegas to deliver an insurance check, Rockford uncovers underworld exploitation of a singer.

programme.title: Mod Squad
programme.desc: Unaware she has contagious meningitis, a singer (Yvonne Craig) who witnessed a mob murder flees the hospital.

programme.title: Charles in Charge
programme.desc: Jamie sets out to convince her boyfriend that she's not shallow.

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: Hayden reminisces about the night he and Christine first met.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: A news reporter conducting a man-on-the-street interview talks with Archie.

programme.title: Nightline
programme.desc: In-depth reporting on one or more of the major stories in the news, with occasional segments on pop culture; journalists Juju Chang and Byron Pitts share hosting duties for this late-night program.

programme.title: Evening News at Six
programme.desc: A daily evening news show for the Hamilton, Halton and Niagara region.

programme.title: Trending Now
programme.desc: Taking a dive into the most talked about stories and celebrating the content that drives conversations both online and in homes; delivering insights on world issues while also highlighting viral trends.

programme.title: Inside Edition
programme.desc: A syndicated newsmagazine includes investigative reports, interviews with newsmakers, human interest stories and celebrity and pop-culture features; the long-running series, which premiered in 1989, is currently anchored by Eva Pilgrim; prior to Pilgrim taking the helm, the show was anchored by Deborah Norville and earlier, by former Fox News mainstay Bill O'Reilly.

programme.title: History of the Sitcom
programme.desc: Sitcom laughs have helped generations of Americans come to grips with their place in a supposed "classless" society.

programme.title: The Price Is Right
programme.desc: Participants must guess the prices of different types of items, ranging from vehicles to electronic appliances, to win a prize.

programme.title: Let's Make a Deal
programme.desc: Costumed contestants compete for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: General Hospital
programme.desc: Carly is on the warpath; Britt is in the hot seat; Dante breaks bad news; Molly wants answers; Charlotte seeks Lulu's help.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: An announcement on the future of the Devereaux Gin Distillery is cut short when the owner is found drowned in his own spirits; the three heirs to the family business become prime suspects as Rex sniffs out the secret ingredient behind a groundbreaking new gin recipe, while Mark revisits the night of the murder to put the family drama to rest.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: An ex-boyfriend asserts partnership rights to a vintage boutique while his ex-girlfriend, backed by a restraining order against him, denies his claims.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: A video surfaces depicting a heated exchange during a custody handoff.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: An employer counters his ex-employees' lawsuit with a 10K claim against them for slander and for filing a false complaint.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: The Judge mediates a payment dispute between a dance studio owner and a single mother; a woman says her roommate's boyfriend entered their apartment unannounced and with his own key; she claims the voicing of her safety concerns led to her eviction.

programme.title: CityNews at 6 Calgary
programme.desc: Coverage of the latest local stories from the locations where they happen.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.desc: An employer counters his ex-employees' lawsuit with a 10K claim against them for slander and for filing a false complaint.

programme.title: One on One
programme.desc: Flex falls for the mother of Breanna's new boyfriend, and they double-date. Rapper Nate Dogg guest stars.

programme.title: One on One
programme.desc: Trying to relive high-school glory, Flex and Duane reunite their old boy band, but they clash over who will be the frontman.

programme.title: One on One
programme.desc: Flex bets his boss he can remain celibate for three days, but his forbearance is tested when he meets an attractive WNBA player (guest star Lisa Leslie).

programme.title: One on One
programme.desc: Flex learns about the downside of fame when he dates an older celebrity; Breanna has mixed emotions when Arnaz starts dating a new girl in school. Vanessa Bell Calloway guest stars.

programme.title: One on One
programme.desc: Flex and Stacy (Holly Robinson Peete) go away together on a business trip; Breanna and Spirit throw a party while Flex is gone.

programme.title: One on One
programme.desc: When Breanna is the one ruled to be a school "hottie," Spirit changes her image in order to get more attention from the boys.

programme.title: One on One
programme.desc: Flex rediscovers why he didn't want to commit to a relationship with his ex-girlfriend Tonya.

programme.title: One on One
programme.desc: A celebrity basketball game for charity provides Flex with the opportunity to try out for the L.A. Clippers.

programme.title: One on One
programme.desc: Flex debates moving to Los Angeles to play in the NBA or staying in Baltimore with his daughter; Arnaz tries to make Breanna jealous by flirting with another girl.

programme.title: One on One
programme.desc: A Baltimore reporter documents Flex's tribulations during NBA try-outs; Breanna and her mother butt heads.

programme.title: One on One
programme.desc: Flex is demoted to the job of wacky weatherman after his shot at NBA glory falls short; Breanna plays games with Arnaz's heart.

programme.title: One on One
programme.desc: Breanna takes driving lessons from an overbearing Flex; Duane becomes a fitness fanatic.

programme.title: One on One
programme.desc: Flex is captivated by Breanna's sophisticated art teacher; Duane moves out of his mother's home, much to the consternation of Flex.

programme.title: One on One
programme.desc: Breanna procures her own credit card and goes on a shopping spree.

programme.title: One on One
programme.desc: Breanna wants to buy a car and hosts a for-profit rave party, featuring a performance by hip-hop artist Method Man.
